dispatch(utterance) {\n1495\t            if (!utterance) return;\n1496\t            textarea.value = '';\n1497\t            textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n1498\t            btnSend.disabled = true;\n1499\t\n1500\t            // Generate a client-side pending ID for the placeholder. placeholder;\n1520\t\n1521\t            try {\n1522\t                var resp = await fetch('/dispatch', {\n1523\t                    method: 'POST',\n1524\t                    headers: { });\n1527\t\n1528\t                if (!resp.ok) {\n1529\t                    var errText = await resp.text();\n1530\t                    console.error('Dispatch error:', errText);\n1531\t                    // Try to parse as JSON for structured error\n1532\t                    var errData;\n1533\t                    try { errData = JSON.parse(errText); } catch (e) {}\n1534\t                    if        if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n1538\t                            placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(errorCard, placeholder);\n1539\t                        }\n1540\t                        delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n1541\t                    }\n1542\t                    return;\n1543\t                }\n1544\t\n1545\t                var data = await placeholder.dataset.pendingId = utteranceId;\n1549\t\n1550\t                // Move the placeholder tracking to the new key\n1551\t                delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n1552\t console.error('Dispatch failed:', err);\n1567\t            }\n1568\t        }\n1569\t\n1570\t        // Web Speech API mic\n1571\t        let recognition = null;\n1572\t\n1573\t        if </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <div class=\"container\">\n        <header>\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px\">\n                <h1>ADC Canvas</h1>\n                <span id=\"versionBadge\" style=\"font-size:12px;color:#475569;font-weight:500;font-family:'Monaco','Menlo',monospace\"></span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"status\">\n                <span class=\"status-dot\" id=\"statusDot\"></span>\n                <span id=\"statusText\">Connecting...</span>\n            </div>\n        </header>\n\n        <div class=\"workload-summary\" id=\"workloadSummary\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"input-bar\">\n            <textarea\n                id=\"inputTextarea\"\n                class=\"input-textarea\"\n                placeholder=\"Ask anything — status of the options pipeline, what's in flight, open beads…\"\n                rows=\"1\"\n            ></textarea>\n            <button class=\"btn-mic\" id=\"btnMic\" title=\"Voice input\">\n                <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n                    <path d=\"M12 2a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v7a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V5a3 3 0 0 0-3-3z\"/>\n                    <path d=\"M19 10v2a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-2\"/>\n                    <line x1=\"12\" y1=\"19\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"23\"/>\n                    <line x1=\"8\" y1=\"23\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"23\"/>\n                </svg>\n            </button>\n            <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"btnSend\" title=\"Send\" disabled>\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n                    <line x1=\"22\" y1=\"2\" x2=\"11\" y2=\"13\"/>\n                    <polygon points=\"22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2\"/>\n                </svg>\n            </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div id=\"topicsContainer\" class=\"topics-grid\">\n            <div class=\"loading\">\n                <div class=\"spinner\"></div>\n                <span>Loading topics...</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Render helpers (createTopicCard + friends) — loaded before the app\n         script so they're available as globals and unit-testable headlessly. -->\n    <script src=\"/canvas.js\"></script>\n    <script>\n        // Session and surface IDs from URL params or generate new\n        const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n        const sessionId = urlParams.get('session_id') || generateId();\n        const surfaceType = 'canvas';\n\n        let surfaceId = null;\n        let eventSource = null;\n\n        // Track pending placeholders so we can find/replace them later.\n        // Key: pendingId (utterance_id), Value: placeholder HTMLElement.\n        var pendingPlaceholders = {};\n\n        // Update URL with session_id for reload persistence\n        if (!urlParams.get('session_id')) {\n            urlParams.set('session_id', sessionId);\n            window.history.replaceState({}, '', `${window.location.pathname}?${urlParams}`);\n        }\n\n        function generateId() {\n            return 'adc-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 16);\n        }\n\n        // createTopicCard / escapeHtml / formatStaleness / getStalenessLevel live\n        // in /canvas.js (loaded below as a blocking <script src> before this\n        // block), so they are available as globals here and unit-testable\n        // headlessly. See src/canvas/canvas.js.\n\n        function updateConnectionStatus(status, text) {\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            const statusText = document.getElementById('statusText');\n\n            dot.className = 'status-dot ' + status;\n            statusText.textContent = text;\n        }\n\n        function showWorkloadSummary(summary) {\n            const el = document.getElementById('workloadSummary');\n            const parts = [];\n\n            if (summary.pending_intents > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.pending_intents}</strong> pending intents`);\n            }\n            if (summary.new_results > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.new_results}</strong> new results`);\n            }\n            if (summary.unresolved_exceptions > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.unresolved_exceptions}</strong> unresolved exceptions`);\n            }\n\n            if (parts.length > 0) {\n                el.innerHTML = '📊 While you were away: ' + parts.join(', ');\n                el.classList.add('show');\n            } else {\n                el.classList.remove('show');\n            }\n        }\n\n        async function registerSurface() {\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch('/api/v1/surfaces/register', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                        session_id: sessionId,\n                        surface_type: surfaceType\n                    })\n                });\n\n                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to register surface');\n\n                const data = await response.json();\n                surfaceId = data.surface_id;\n                return surfaceId;\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error registering surface:', error);\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Registry project list for the first-run welcome card\n        // (config/registry.yaml → GET /api/v1/registry). DB/result independent —\n        // the welcome card renders even against an empty component store. Cached\n        // after the first fetch so the per-SSE-event reloads don't refetch it.\n        let welcomeProjects = null;\n\n        async function loadWelcomeProjects() {\n            if (welcomeProjects) return welcomeProjects;\n            try {\n                const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/registry');\n                if (resp.ok) {\n                    const data = await resp.json();\n                    welcomeProjects = (data && data.projects) || [];\n                    return welcomeProjects;\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error loading registry for welcome card:', error);\n            }\n            // Graceful fallback: an empty list still renders the welcome card\n            // (with default example utterances), so a wedged registry endpoint\n            // never leaves the canvas bare.\n            welcomeProjects = [];\n            return welcomeProjects;\n        }\n\n        async function loadTopics() {\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch(`/api/v1/sessions/${sessionId}/topics`);\n                if (!response.ok) return;\n\n                const data = await response.json();\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n                const cards = data.cards || [];\n\n                // Fresh session (zero topics): show the first-run welcome card\n                // instead of the bare empty-state. Its project list + example\n                // utterances come from the registry (never the DB), so we only\n                // need to fetch it on the zero-card branch. The welcome card is\n                // dropped — not duplicated — the moment the first real result\n                // lands: the next SSE result_created → loadTopics() reload\n                // yields a non-empty card set, so buildContainerChildren()\n                // returns topic cards only (clearing the welcome card).\n                const projects = cards.length ? [] : await loadWelcomeProjects();\n\n                // Build map of existing cards by card_id for in-place updates\n                const existingCards = new Map();\n                container.querySelectorAll('[data-card-id]').forEach(card => {\n                    const cardId = card.dataset.cardId;\n                    if (cardId) existingCards.set(cardId, card);\n                });\n\n                // Track which card_ids from the new set we've seen\n                const seenCardIds = new Set();\n\n                // Update or create cards\n                cards.forEach(cardData => {\n                    const cardId = cardData.card_id;\n                    seenCardIds.add(cardId);\n\n                    const existingCard = existingCards.get(cardId);\n                    if (existingCard) {\n                        // In-place update: replace the existing card with new content\n                        const newCard = createTopicCard(cardData);\n                        existingCard.replaceWith(newCard);\n                    } else {\n                        // Create new card\n                        const newCard = createTopicCard(cardData);\n                        container.appendChild(newCard);\n                    }\n                });\n\n                // Remove cards that are no longer in the new set (excluding welcome/error/stuck/failed cards)\n                existingCards.forEach((card, cardId) => {\n                    if (!seenCardIds.has(cardId) && !card.dataset.builtin) {\n                        card.remove();\n                    }\n                });\n\n                // Handle welcome card for empty state\n                if (cards.length === 0) {\n                    // Remove any existing welcome card\n                    const existingWelcome = container.querySelector('[data-builtin=\"welcome\"]');\n                    if (existingWelcome) existingWelcome.remove();\n\n                    // Add welcome card\n                    const welcomeCard = createWelcomeCard(projects);\n                    container.appendChild(welcomeCard);\n                } else {\n                    // Remove welcome card if we have real cards\n                    const welcomeCard = container.querySelector('[data-builtin=\"welcome\"]');\n                    if (welcomeCard) welcomeCard.remove();\n                }\n\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error loading topics:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        function connectSSE() {\n            updateConnectionStatus('connecting', 'Connecting...');\n\n            const url = `/api/v1/sse?surface_id=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceId)}&session_id=${encodeURIComponent(sessionId)}&surface_type=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceType)}`;\n            eventSource = new EventSource(url);\n\n            eventSource.onopen = () => {\n                updateConnectionStatus('', 'Connected');\n                loadTopics();\n            };\n\n            eventSource.onerror = (error) => {\n                console.error('SSE error:', error);\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n            };\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('SSE connected:', data);\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('workload_summary', (event) => {\n                const summary = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                showWorkloadSummary(summary);\n            });\n\n            // Dispatch ack: backup path for intent_ids if the fetch response didn't\n            // include them (e.g., the response arrived before the intent was routed).\n            eventSource.addEventListener('dispatch_ack', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                const utteranceId = data.utterance_id;\n                const intentIds = data.intent_ids;\n                const utterance = data.utterance;\n\n                if (!utteranceId || !intentIds || !Array.isArray(intentIds)) return;\n\n                // Check if there's an existing placeholder to split\n                const placeholder = pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n                const createdAt = placeholder\n                    ? parseInt(placeholder.dataset.createdAt, 10)\n                    : Date.now();\n\n                // Split into per-thread pending cards\n                const threadCards = splitPlaceholderToThreads(utterance, createdAt, intentIds);\n\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n                if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n                    // Replace the placeholder with the thread cards\n                    const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n                    threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n                    placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(frag, placeholder);\n                } else {\n                    // No placeholder (test scenario or race condition): prepend thread cards\n                    const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n                    threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n                    container.insertBefore(frag, container.firstChild);\n                }\n\n                // No longer track this placeholder\n                delete pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n            });\n\n            // Thread-level progress event\n            eventSource.addEventListener('thread_progress', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                const threadId = data.thread_id;\n\n                if (!threadId) {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: missing thread_id in event data');\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Find the pending thread card by thread_id\n                const threadCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + threadId + '\"]');\n                if (!threadCard) {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: threadCard not found for thread_id=' + threadId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (!threadCard.classList.contains('pending-card')) {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: threadCard does not have pending-card class for thread_id=' + threadId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (typeof _setProgress !== 'function') {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: _setProgress is not a function');\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Pass progress message (e.g., '3/5 sources in') to _setProgress()\n                const completed = data.completed;\n                const total = data.total;\n                _setProgress(threadCard, { completed: completed, total: total });\n            });\n\n            // Per-source progress update for a thread\n            eventSource.addEventListener('progress_update', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                const intentId = data.intent_id;\n                const completed = data.completed;\n                const total = data.total;\n\n                if (!intentId) return;\n\n                // Find the pending thread card by intent_id\n                const threadCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + intentId + '\"]');\n                if (!threadCard) {\n                    console.warn('progress_update: threadCard is null for intent_id=' + intentId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (!threadCard.classList.contains('pending-card')) {\n                    console.warn('progress_update: threadCard does not have pending-card class for intent_id=' + intentId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (typeof _setProgress !== 'function') {\n                    console.warn('progress_update: _setProgress is not a function');\n                    return;\n                }\n                _setProgress(threadCard, { completed: completed, total: total });\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('result_created', (event) => {\n                const result = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('New result:', result);\n\n                // Find and remove the pending card for this intent before reloading\n                const intentId = result.intent_id;\n                if (intentId) {\n                    const pendingCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + intentId + '\"]');\n                    if (pendingCard) {\n                        // Remove the pending card so it doesn't flicker when loadTopics() renders the real result\n                        pendingCard.remove();\n                        console.log('Removed pending card for intent_id:', intentId);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                loadTopics(); // Reload topics to show new result\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('topic_updated', (event) => {\n                const topic = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Topic updated:', topic);\n                loadTopics();\n            });\n\n            // Task stuck event: render stuck card when a bead is fenced\n            eventSource.addEventListener('task_stuck', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Task stuck:', data);\n\n                // Find and remove any pending card for this intent\n                const intentId = data.intent_id;\n                if (intentId) {\n                    const pendingCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + intentId + '\"]');\n                    if (pendingCard) {\n                        pendingCard.remove();\n                        console.log('Removed pending card for stuck intent_id:', intentId);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Create and prepend the stuck card\n                const stuckCard = createStuckCard(data);\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n                // Clear loading/empty state if present\n                if (container.querySelector('.loading') || container.querySelector('.empty-state')) {\n                    container.innerHTML = '';\n                }\n\n                // Prepend stuck card (newest first)\n                container.insertBefore(stuckCard, container.firstChild);\n            });\n\n            // Task failed event: render failed card on terminal failure\n            eventSource.addEventListener('task_failed', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Task failed:', data);\n\n                // Find and remove any pending card for this intent\n                const intentId = data.intent_id;\n                if (intentId) {\n                    const pendingCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + intentId + '\"]');\n                    if (pendingCard) {\n                        pendingCard.remove();\n                        console.log('Removed pending card for failed intent_id:', intentId);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Create and prepend the failed card\n                const failedCard = createFailedCard(data);\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n                // Clear loading/empty state if present\n                if (container.querySelector('.loading') || container.querySelector('.empty-state')) {\n                    container.innerHTML = '';\n                }\n\n                // Prepend failed card (newest first)\n                container.insertBefore(failedCard, container.firstChild);\n            });\n\n            // Approval required event: render approval card for action beads\n            eventSource.addEventListener('approval_required', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Approval required:', data);\n\n                // Find and remove any pending card for this intent\n                const intentId = data.intent_id;\n                if (intentId) {\n                    const pendingCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + intentId + '\"]');\n                    if (pendingCard) {\n                        pendingCard.remove();\n                        console.log('Removed pending card for approval_required intent_id:', intentId);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Create and prepend the approval card\n                const approvalCard = createApprovalCard(data);\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n                // Clear loading/empty state if present\n                if (container.querySelector('.loading') || container.querySelector('.empty-state')) {\n                    container.innerHTML = '';\n                }\n\n                // Prepend approval card (newest first)\n                container.insertBefore(approvalCard, container.firstChild);\n            });\n\n            // Error event: render error card from degraded-state SSE error events\n            eventSource.addEventListener('error', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Error event:', data);\n\n                // Find and remove any pending card for this intent/pending before rendering error\n                const intentId = data.intent_id;\n                const pendingId = data.pending_id;\n                let selector = null;\n                if (intentId) {\n                    selector = '[data-pending-id=\"' + intentId + '\"]';\n                } else if (pendingId) {\n                    selector = '[data-pending-id=\"' + pendingId + '\"]';\n                }\n\n                if (selector) {\n                    const pendingCard = document.querySelector(selector);\n                    if (pendingCard) {\n                        pendingCard.remove();\n                        console.log('Removed pending card for error event:', selector);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Create and prepend the error card\n                const errorCard = createErrorCard(data);\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n                // Clear loading/empty state if present\n                if (container.querySelector('.loading') || container.querySelector('.empty-state')) {\n                    container.innerHTML = '';\n                }\n\n                // Prepend error card (newest first)\n                container.insertBefore(errorCard, container.firstChild);\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('disconnect', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Server disconnect:', data);\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n                eventSource.close();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Elapsed-time ticker for pending cards\n        // Every second, update the elapsed-time footer on all pending cards\n        // and apply aged treatment if they've exceeded the 30s threshold.\n        setInterval(function () {\n            var now = Date.now();\n            var pendingCards = document.querySelectorAll('.pending-card[data-pending-id]');\n            pendingCards.forEach(function (card) {\n                tickPendingElapsed(card, now);\n                applyAgedTreatment(card, now);\n            });\n        }, 1000);\n\n        // Heartbeat to keep surface alive\n        setInterval(() => {\n            if (surfaceId) {\n                fetch('/api/v1/surfaces/heartbeat', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                        surface_id: surfaceId,\n                        session_id: sessionId\n                    })\n                }).catch(console.error);\n            }\n        }, 30000); // Every 30 seconds\n\n        // ── Input bar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n        const textarea = document.getElementById('inputTextarea');\n        const btnSend  = document.getElementById('btnSend');\n        const btnMic   = document.getElementById('btnMic');\n\n        // Auto-resize textarea\n        textarea.addEventListener('input', () => {\n            textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n            textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n            btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n        });\n\n        // Send on Enter (Shift+Enter = newline)\n        textarea.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                if (!btnSend.disabled) dispatch(textarea.value.trim());\n            }\n        });\n\n        btnSend.addEventListener('click', () => {\n            if (!btnSend.disabled) dispatch(textarea.value.trim());\n        });\n\n        async function dispatch(utterance) {\n            if (!utterance) return;\n            textarea.value = '';\n            textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n            btnSend.disabled = true;\n\n            // Generate a client-side pending ID for the placeholder. We'll swap it\n            // for the server's utterance_id when the response arrives.\n            var pendingId = 'pending-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 8);\n            var createdAt = Date.now();\n\n            // Create the pending placeholder NOW, before the server round-trip,\n            // so a hung server still leaves a card on canvas to age.\n            var placeholder = createPendingPlaceholderCard(utterance, createdAt, pendingId);\n            var container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n            // Clear the empty-state/loading spinner if present\n            if (container.querySelector('.loading') || container.querySelector('.empty-state')) {\n                container.innerHTML = '';\n            }\n\n            // Prepend the placeholder (newest first)\n            container.insertBefore(placeholder, container.firstChild);\n\n            // Track it so we can find/replace it later\n            pendingPlaceholders[pendingId] = placeholder;\n\n            try {\n                var resp = await fetch('/dispatch', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({ utterance, session_id: sessionId, surface_id: surfaceId, pending_id: pendingId }),\n                });\n\n                if (!resp.ok) {\n                    var errText = await resp.text();\n                    console.error('Dispatch error:', errText);\n                    // Try to parse as JSON for structured error\n                    var errData;\n                    try { errData = JSON.parse(errText); } catch (e) {}\n                    if (errData && errData.error_type) {\n                        // Replace placeholder with error card\n                        var errorCard = createErrorCard(errData);\n                        if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n                            placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(errorCard, placeholder);\n                        }\n                        delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n                    }\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                var data = await resp.json();\n                // Swap to the server's utterance_id for consistency\n                var utteranceId = data.utterance_id || pendingId;\n                placeholder.dataset.pendingId = utteranceId;\n\n                // Move the placeholder tracking to the new key\n                delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n                pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId] = placeholder;\n\n                // If intent_ids are present, split into per-thread pending cards\n                if (data.intent_ids && Array.isArray(data.intent_ids) && data.intent_ids.length > 0) {\n                    var threadCards = splitPlaceholderToThreads(utterance, createdAt, data.intent_ids);\n                    // Replace the placeholder with the thread cards\n                    if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n                        var frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n                        threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n                        placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(frag, placeholder);\n                    }\n                    delete pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n                }\n            } catch (err) {\n                console.error('Dispatch failed:', err);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Web Speech API mic\n        let recognition = null;\n\n        if ('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window || 'SpeechRecognition' in window) {\n            const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;\n            recognition = new SpeechRecognition();\n            recognition.continuous = false;\n            recognition.interimResults = true;\n            recognition.lang = 'en-US';\n\n            let finalTranscript = '';\n\n            recognition.onstart = () => {\n                btnMic.classList.add('recording');\n                finalTranscript = textarea.value;\n            };\n\n            recognition.onresult = (e) => {\n                let interim = '';\n                for (let i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {\n                    if (e.results[i].isFinal) {\n                        finalTranscript += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n                    } else {\n                        interim += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n                    }\n                }\n                textarea.value = finalTranscript + interim;\n                textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n                textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n                btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n            };\n\n            recognition.onend = () => {\n                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n                if (finalTranscript.trim()) dispatch(finalTranscript.trim());\n            };\n\n            recognition.onerror = (e) => {\n                console.error('Speech recognition error:', e.error);\n                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n            };\n\n            btnMic.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                if (btnMic.classList.contains('recording')) {\n                    recognition.stop();\n                } else {\n                    recognition.start();\n                }\n            });\n        } else {\n            // Fallback: MediaRecorder + whisper-stt for browsers without Web Speech API\n            let mediaRecorder = null;\n            let audioChunks = [];\n\n            async function startRecording() {\n                try {\n                    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });\n                    mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);\n                    audioChunks = [];\n\n                    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (event) => {\n                        if (event.data.size > 0) {\n                            audioChunks.push(event.data);\n                        }\n                    };\n\n                    mediaRecorder.onstop = async () => {\n                        btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n                        btnMic.innerHTML = '🎤';\n\n                        // Create audio blob and convert to base64\n                        const audioBlob = new Blob(audioChunks, { type: 'audio/webm' });\n                        const reader = new FileReader();\n                        reader.onloadend = async () => {\n                            const base64Audio = reader.result.split(',')[1];\n\n                            try {\n                                const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/stt', {\n                                    method: 'POST',\n                                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                                        audio_data: base64Audio,\n                                        format: 'webm'\n                                    })\n                                });\n\n                                if (resp.ok) {\n                                    const data = await resp.json();\n                                    if (data.text) {\n                                        textarea.value = data.text;\n                                        textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n                                        textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n                                        btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n                                        // Auto-dispatch on successful transcription\n                                        dispatch(data.text.trim());\n                                    }\n                                } else {\n                                    const err = await resp.json();\n                                    console.error('STT error:', err);\n                                    btnMic.title = `Transcription failed: ${err.error || 'Unknown error'}`;\n                                    setTimeout(() => {\n                                        btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n                                    }, 3000);\n                                }\n                            } catch (err) {\n                                console.error('STT request failed:', err);\n                                btnMic.title = 'STT service unavailable';\n                                setTimeout(() => {\n                                    btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n                                }, 3000);\n                            }\n                        };\n                        reader.readAsDataURL(audioBlob);\n\n                        // Stop all tracks to release microphone\n                        stream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());\n                    };\n\n                    mediaRecorder.start();\n                    btnMic.classList.add('recording');\n                    btnMic.innerHTML = '⏹';\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.error('MediaRecorder access failed:', err);\n                    btnMic.title = 'Microphone access denied';\n                    btnMic.style.opacity = '0.4';\n                    btnMic.disabled = true;\n                }\n            }\n\n            function stopRecording() {\n                if (mediaRecorder && mediaRecorder.state === 'recording') {\n                    mediaRecorder.stop();\n                }\n            }\n\n            btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n            btnMic.disabled = false;\n            btnMic.style.opacity = '1';\n\n            btnMic.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                if (btnMic.classList.contains('recording')) {\n                    stopRecording();\n                } else {\n                    startRecording();\n                }\n            });\n        }\n\n        // ── Initialize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n        // Initialize\n        async function init() {\n            try {\n                // Show version\n                const meta = await fetch('/openapi.json').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null);\n                if (meta && meta.info && meta.info.version) {\n                    document.getElementById('versionBadge').textContent = 'v' + meta.info.version;\n                }\n\n                await registerSurface();\n                connectSSE();\n            } catch (error) {\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Failed to connect');\n                console.error('Initialization error:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        init();\n    </script>\n\n    <!-- ── Agentation: element-selector feedback toolbar ────────────────────── -->\n    <script>\n    (function () {\n        var active = false;\n        var selectedEl = null;\n\n        // Build a stable CSS selector for a given element\n        function buildSelector(el) {\n            if (!el || el === document.body) return 'body';\n            var parts = [];\n            var cur = el;\n            while (cur && cur !== document.body && cur !== document.documentElement) {\n                if (cur.id) { parts.unshift('#' + cur.id); break; }\n                var tag = cur.tagName.toLowerCase();\n                var classes = Array.from(cur.classList)\n                    .filter(function (c) { return c.length > 1; })\n                    .slice(0, 2);\n                var part = tag + (classes.length ? '.' + classes.join('.') : '');\n                // add nth-of-type when siblings share the same tag\n                if (cur.parentElement) {\n                    var sibs = Array.from(cur.parentElement.children)\n                        .filter(function (s) { return s.tagName === cur.tagName; });\n                    if (sibs.length > 1) part += ':nth-of-type(' + (sibs.indexOf(cur) + 1) + ')';\n                }\n                parts.unshift(part);\n                cur = cur.parentElement;\n            }\n            return parts.join(' > ');\n        }\n\n        // Highlight box\n        var hlBox = document.createElement('div');\n        hlBox.style.cssText = [\n            'position:fixed', 'pointer-events:none', 'z-index:9998',\n            'border:2px solid #3b82f6', 'background:rgba(59,130,246,.08)',\n            'border-radius:4px', 'display:none', 'transition:all .08s'\n        ].join(';');\n        document.body.appendChild(hlBox);\n\n        function moveHighlight(el) {\n            if (!el || el === document.body) { hlBox.style.display = 'none'; return; }\n            var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n            hlBox.style.cssText = hlBox.style.cssText; // keep existing\n            hlBox.style.display = 'block';\n            hlBox.style.left  = (r.left   - 2) + 'px';\n            hlBox.style.top   = (r.top    - 2) + 'px';\n            hlBox.style.width = (r.width  + 4) + 'px';\n            hlBox.style.height= (r.height + 4) + 'px';\n        }\n\n        // Popover\n        var pop = document.createElement('div');\n        pop.style.cssText = [\n            'position:fixed', 'z-index:9999', 'display:none', 'width:300px',\n            'background:#1e293b', 'border:1px solid #3b82f6', 'border-radius:8px',\n            'padding:12px', 'box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5)',\n            'font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,\"Segoe UI\",Roboto,sans-serif'\n        ].join(';');\n        pop.innerHTML = [\n            '<div id=\"atn-sel\" style=\"font-size:11px;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:6px;',\n                'font-family:monospace;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap\"></div>',\n            '<textarea id=\"atn-txt\" rows=\"3\" placeholder=\"Describe what to change…\" style=\"',\n                'width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:#0f1419;border:1px solid #334155;',\n                'color:#e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;font-size:13px;',\n                'resize:none;font-family:inherit;outline:none\"></textarea>',\n            '<div style=\"display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:8px\">',\n                '<button id=\"atn-cancel\" style=\"flex:1;padding:6px;background:#334155;border:none;',\n                    'color:#94a3b8;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px\">Cancel</button>',\n                '<button id=\"atn-send\" style=\"flex:1;padding:6px;background:#3b82f6;border:none;',\n                    'color:#fff;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:500\">',\n                    'Send feedback</button>',\n            '</div>'\n        ].join('');\n        document.body.appendChild(pop);\n\n        function positionPop(el) {\n            var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n            var top  = r.bottom + 8;\n            var left = r.left;\n            if (top  + 180 > window.innerHeight) top  = r.top - 188;\n            if (left + 308 > window.innerWidth)  left = window.innerWidth - 316;\n            if (left < 8) left = 8;\n            pop.style.top  = top  + 'px';\n            pop.style.left = left + 'px';\n            pop.style.display = 'block';\n        }\n\n        // Toggle button (bottom-right corner)\n        var toggleBtn = document.createElement('button');\n        toggleBtn.id = 'atn-btn';\n        toggleBtn.textContent = '✏️ Feedback';\n        toggleBtn.title = 'Click any element to give UI feedback';\n        toggleBtn.style.cssText = [\n            'position:fixed', 'bottom:16px', 'right:16px', 'z-index:9997',\n            'padding:8px 14px', 'background:#1e293b', 'border:1px solid #334155',\n            'color:#94a3b8', 'border-radius:20px', 'cursor:pointer', 'font-size:13px',\n            'font-family:inherit', 'transition:all .15s'\n        ].join(';');\n        document.body.appendChild(toggleBtn);\n\n        function enterMode() {\n            active = true;\n            toggleBtn.style.background = '#1e3a5f';\n            toggleBtn.style.borderColor = '#3b82f6';\n            toggleBtn.style.color = '#60a5fa';\n            toggleBtn.textContent = '✕ Cancel';\n            document.body.style.cursor = 'crosshair';\n        }\n\n        function exitMode() {\n            active = false;\n            selectedEl = null;\n            hlBox.style.display = 'none';\n            pop.style.display = 'none';\n            toggleBtn.style.background = '#1e293b';\n            toggleBtn.style.borderColor = '#334155';\n            toggleBtn.style.color = '#94a3b8';\n            toggleBtn.textContent = '✏️ Feedback';\n            document.body.style.cursor = '';\n            document.getElementById('atn-txt').value = '';\n        }\n\n        toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {\n            if (active) exitMode(); else enterMode();\n        });\n\n        document.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {\n            if (!active || pop.style.display === 'block') return;\n            var t = e.target;\n            if (t === toggleBtn || t === hlBox || t.closest('#atn-popover')) return;\n            moveHighlight(t);\n        });\n\n        document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {\n            if (!active) return;\n            if (e.target === toggleBtn || e.target.closest && e.target.closest('[id^=\"atn-\"]')) return;\n            e.preventDefault();\n            e.stopPropagation();\n            selectedEl = e.target;\n            document.getElementById('atn-sel').textContent = buildSelector(selectedEl);\n            document.getElementById('atn-txt').value = '';\n            positionPop(selectedEl);\n            setTimeout(function () { document.getElementById('atn-txt').focus(); }, 30);\n        }, true);\n\n        document.getElementById('atn-cancel').addEventListener('click', exitMode);\n\n        document.getElementById('atn-txt').addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); sendFeedback(); }\n            if (e.key === 'Escape') exitMode();\n        });\n\n        document.getElementById('atn-send').addEventListener('click', sendFeedback);\n\n        async function sendFeedback() {\n            var text = document.getElementById('atn-txt').value.trim();\n            if (!text || !selectedEl) return;\n            var sel     = buildSelector(selectedEl);\n            var elHtml  = selectedEl.outerHTML.slice(0, 2000);\n            var sendBtn = document.getElementById('atn-send');\n            sendBtn.textContent = 'Sending…';\n            sendBtn.disabled = true;\n            try {\n                await fetch('/api/v1/feedback', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                        feedback: text,\n                        feedback_type: 'component_iteration',\n                        context: { selector: sel, element_html: elHtml },\n                        session_id: sessionId,\n                    }),\n                });\n                showToast('Feedback sent');\n            } catch (err) {\n                showToast('Failed to send', true);\n                console.error('Feedback error:', err);\n            }\n            exitMode();\n        }\n\n        function showToast(msg, isError) {\n            var t = document.createElement('div');\n            t.style.cssText = [\n                'position:fixed', 'bottom:56px', 'right:16px', 'z-index:10000',\n                'background:' + (isError ? '#7f1d1d' : '#166534'),\n                'color:'      + (isError ? IntentType.ACTION: FetchIntentType.ACTION,\n820\t            IntentType.BRAINSTORM: FetchIntentType.BRAINSTORM,\n821\t            IntentType.LOOKUP: FetchIntentType.LOOKUP,\n822\t    return None\n879\t\n880\t    async def _create_stuck_card_from_fence(\n881\t        self,\n882\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n883\t        fence_context: dict,\n884\t    ) -> dict:\n885\t _escalate_to_bead(\n1012\t        self,\n1013\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n1014\t        timings: DispatchTimings,\n1015\t    ) -> dict:\n1016\t        \"\"\"\n1017\t        Escalate a routed_intent.session_id\n1034\t            )\n1035\t\n1036\t            # If there are fenced beads, extract fence context and create stuck card\n1037\t            if fenced_beads:\n1038\t errors.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterTimeoutError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router LLM call timed out.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterQuotaError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router LLM call quota exhausted.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterProxyError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router LLM proxy unreachable.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterMalformedError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router returned malformed JSON (after corrective retry).\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parse_error: str, raw_output: str, retry_count: int = 0):\n        self.parse_error = parse_error\n        self.raw_output = raw_output\n        self.retry_count = retry_count\n        super().__init__(f\"Malformed router output (retry {retry_count}): {parse_error}\")\n\n\nclass IntentType(Enum):\n    \"\"\"Intent types that the router can classify.\"\"\"\n    STATUS = \"status\"\n    ACTION = \"action\"\n    BRAINSTORM = \"brainstorm\"\n    LOOKUP = \"lookup\"\n    REMINDER = \"reminder\"\n    SELF_MODIFICATION = \"self-modification\"\n    MONITORING_CONFIG = \"monitoring-config\"\n    TASK_PROFILE = \"task-profile\"  # Escalate to NEEDLE bead\n    CLARIFICATION = \"clarification\"  # Needs user input\n    STUCK = \"stuck\"  # Stuck intent - task blocked by circuit breaker\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass IntentClassification:\n    \"\"\"Result of intent classification.\"\"\"\n    intent_type: IntentType\n    project_slug: str | None = None\n    confidence: float = 1.0\n    utterance_fragment: str = \"\"\n    reasoning: str = \"\"\n    urgency: str = \"normal\"  # critical, high, normal, low\n    lookup_kind: str | None = None  # lookup intents only: 'logs' | 'config' | 'docs'\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass RoutedIntent:\n    \"\"\"A routed intent ready for processing.\"\"\"\n    intent_id: str\n    classification: IntentClassification\n    session_id: str\n    utterance: str\n    # router_ms is measured once around classify_utterance() in route_utterance\n    # (one LLM call per utterance) and shared across every intent thread from\n    # that utterance — see Latency Budget & Instrumentation in docs/plan/plan.md.\n    router_ms: int | None = None\n\n\n# Path to the router segmentation prompt. Read from disk on each classify_utterance()\n# call so edits to prompts/router.md take effect without a server restart (hot-reload),\n# matching the pattern in src/synthesize/strand.py (SYNTHESIZE_PROMPT_PATH).\nROUTER_PROMPT_PATH = Path(\"/home/coding/aide-de-camp/prompts/router.md\")\n\n# Fallback used only if the prompt file cannot be read at runtime.\n_ROUTER_PROMPT_FALLBACK = (\n    \"You are the Intent Router for aide-de-camp. Segment the utterance into \"\n    \"distinct intent threads, classify each, and return ONLY a JSON array of \"\n    \"intent objects.\"\n)\n\n\nclass IntentRouter:\n    \"\"\"\n    Intent Router classifies utterances and routes to appropriate strands.\n\n    For task-profile intents, routes to escalate strand for bead creation.\n    For other intents, routes to fetch + synthesize strands (TODO).\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, store=None, prompt_path: Optional[Path] = None):\n        self.store = store\n        self.prompt_path = prompt_path or ROUTER_PROMPT_PATH\n        self._zai_client = None\n        self._reload_manager = None\n\n    async def _get_zai_client(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create ZAI client.\"\"\"\n        if self._zai_client is None:\n            self._zai_client = get_zai_client()\n        return self._zai_client\n\n    async def _get_store(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create session store.\"\"\"\n        if self.store is None:\n            self.store = get_store()\n        return self.store\n\n    def _get_reload_manager(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create the hot-reload manager (lazy singleton).\"\"\"\n        if self._reload_manager is None:\n            self._reload_manager = get_reload_manager()\n        return self._reload_manager\n\n    def _load_router_prompt(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Load the router segmentation prompt from disk (hot-reload, per call).\"\"\"\n        try:\n            return self.prompt_path.read_text()\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to load router prompt from {self.prompt_path}: {e}\")\n            return _ROUTER_PROMPT_FALLBACK\n\n    def _load_urgency_prompt(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Load the urgency classification prompt from disk via the hot-reload manager.\n\n        prompts/urgency.md is a separately hot-reloadable artifact (registered in\n        src/components/hot_reload.py). Splicing it here keeps urgency guidance\n        editable independently of the segmentation prompt. Returns \"\" on failure\n        so the router still functions without urgency guidance.\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            return self._get_reload_manager().get_prompt(\"urgency\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to load urgency prompt: {e}\")\n            return \"\"\n\n    def _build_system_prompt(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Build the full system prompt: segmentation prompt + urgency rules.\"\"\"\n        system_prompt = self._load_router_prompt()\n        urgency_prompt = self._load_urgency_prompt()\n        if urgency_prompt:\n            system_prompt = (\n                f\"{system_prompt}\\n\\n## Urgency Classification Rules\\n\\n{urgency_prompt}\"\n            )\n        return system_prompt\n\n    async def classify_utterance(\n        self,\n        utterance: str,\n        session_id: str,\n        retry_on_malformed: bool = True,\n    ) -> list[IntentClassification]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Classify an utterance into intents.\n\n        Uses LLM to segment and classify the utterance.\n\n        Args:\n            utterance: The user utterance\n            session_id: Session ID for context\n            retry_on_malformed: If True, perform one corrective retry on JSON parse failure\n\n        Returns:\n            List of IntentClassification objects\n\n        Raises:\n            RouterTimeoutError: LLM call timed out\n            RouterQuotaError: LLM quota exhausted\n            RouterProxyError: LLM proxy unreachable\n            RouterMalformedError: Malformed JSON after corrective retry\n        \"\"\"\n        client = await self._get_zai_client()\n\n        # Build user message with session context if available\n        store = await self._get_store()\n        session_context = \"\"\n        try:\n            session = await store.get_session(session_id)\n            if session:\n                # Get recent intents for context\n                recent_intents = await store.get_recent_intents(session_id, limit=5)\n                if recent_intents:\n                    session_context = \"\\n\\nRecent intents in this session:\\n\"\n                    for intent in recent_intents:\n                        session_context += f\"- {intent.get('utterance', '')} ({intent.get('intent_type', 'unknown')})\\n\"\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to get session context: {e}\")\n\n        user_message = f\"Classify this utterance:\\n\\n{utterance}{session_context}\"\n\n        logger.info(f\"Classifying utterance for session {session_id}\")\n\n        # Build system prompt per call from prompts/router.md (+ urgency rules),\n        # so edits to either prompt take effect without a server restart.\n        system_prompt = self._build_system_prompt()\n\n        # Track retry attempt for malformed JSON\n        retry_count = 0\n        raw_response = None\n\n        try:\n            response = await client.call_simple(\n                system_prompt=system_prompt,\n                user_message=user_message,\n                model=ModelClass.SONNET.value,\n                max_tokens=2048,\n                temperature=0.3,  # Lower temperature for consistent classification\n            )\n\n            # Store raw response for error reporting\n            raw_response = response\n\n            # Strip markdown code fences if present (ZAI proxy wraps in ```json...```)\n            raw = response.strip()\n            if raw.startswith(\"```\"):\n                raw = raw.split(\"\\n\", 1)[-1]\n                raw = raw.rsplit(\"```\", 1)[0].strip()\n\n            # Parse JSON response\n            intents_data = json.loads(raw)\n            classifications = []\n\n            for intent_data in intents_data:\n                # Map string to IntentType enum\n                intent_type_str = intent_data.get(\"intent_type\", \"status\")\n                try:\n                    intent_type = IntentType(intent_type_str)\n                except ValueError:\n                    logger.warning(f\"Unknown intent type: {intent_type_str}\")\n                    intent_type = IntentType.STATUS\n\n                classification = IntentClassification(\n                    intent_type=intent_type,\n                    project_slug=intent_data.get(\"project_slug\"),\n                    confidence=float(intent_data.get(\"confidence\", 0.8)),\n                    utterance_fragment=intent_data.get(\"utterance_fragment\", utterance),\n                    reasoning=intent_data.get(\"reasoning\", \"\"),\n                    urgency=intent_data.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n                    lookup_kind=intent_data.get(\"lookup_kind\") if intent_type == IntentType.LOOKUP else None,\n                )\n                classifications.append(classification)\n\n            logger.info(f\"Classified {len(classifications)} intents from utterance\")\n            return classifications\n\n        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to parse router response as JSON: {e}\")\n\n            # Implement one corrective retry on malformed JSON\n            if retry_on_malformed and retry_count == 0:\n                logger.info(\"Malformed JSON detected, attempting corrective retry...\")\n                retry_count += 1\n                try:\n                    # Retry once with same parameters\n                    return await self.classify_utterance(\n                        utterance=utterance,\n                        session_id=session_id,\n                        retry_on_malformed=False,  # Prevent infinite retry\n                    )\n                except json.JSONDecode as retry_e:\n                    # Retry also failed - raise RouterMalformedError\n                    raise RouterMalformedError(\n                        parse_error=str(e),\n                        raw_output=raw_response or \"\",\n                        retry_count=retry_count,\n                    ) from retry_e\n\n            # No retry or retry failed - raise RouterMalformedError\n            raise RouterMalformedError(\n                parse_error=str(e),\n                raw_output=raw_response or \"\",\n                retry_count=retry_count,\n            ) from e\n\n        except (LLMTimeoutError, asyncio.TimeoutError) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Router LLM call timed out: {e}\")\n            raise RouterTimeoutError(f\"Router LLM call timed out: {e}\") from e\n\n        except (LLMRateLimitError,) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Router LLM call quota exhausted: {e}\")\n            raise RouterQuotaError(f\"Router LLM call quota exhausted: {e}\") from e\n\n        except (LLMError, httpx.HTTPError) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Router LLM proxy unreachable: {e}\")\n            raise RouterProxyError(f\"Router LLM proxy unreachable: {e}\") from e\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Classification failed with unexpected error: {e}\")\n            # Wrap unknown errors as RouterProxyError for graceful degradation\n            raise RouterProxyError(f\"Router LLM call failed: {e}\") from e\n\n    async def route_utterance(\n        self,\n        utterance: str,\n        utterance_id: str,\n        session_id: str,\n    ) -> list[RoutedIntent]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Route an utterance to appropriate strands.\n\n        Classifies the utterance and routes each intent to the correct strand.\n\n        Args:\n            utterance: The user utterance\n            utterance_id: Unique ID for this utterance\n            session_id: Session ID\n\n        Returns:\n            List of RoutedIntent objects\n\n        Raises:\n            RouterError: If router fails and broadcasts error event\n        \"\"\"\n        # Generate a fallback intent_id for error reporting\n        error_intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n\n        try:\n            # Classify the utterance (one LLM call per utterance — the router stage\n            # is shared across every intent thread it produces, so its duration is\n            # measured once here and stamped onto each RoutedIntent).\n            classify_start = time.monotonic()\n            classifications = await self.classify_utterance(utterance, session_id)\n            router_ms = int((time.monotonic() - classify_start) * 1000)\n\n            routed_intents = []\n            for classification in classifications:\n                # Create intent ID\n                intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n\n                routed_intent = RoutedIntent(\n                    intent_id=intent_id,\n                    classification=classification,\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    utterance=classification.utterance_fragment,\n                    router_ms=router_ms,\n                )\n                routed_intents.append(routed_intent)\n\n            return routed_intents\n\n        except RouterMalformedError as e:\n            # Malformed JSON after corrective retry - broadcast clarification card\n            logger.error(f\"Router malformed after retry: {e.parse_error}\")\n            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n            await handler.broadcast_clarification_card(\n                utterance=utterance,\n                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                parse_error=e.parse_error,\n                retry_count=e.retry_count,\n                raw_output_snippet=e.raw_output[:200] if e.raw_output else None,\n            )\n            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n\n        except RouterTimeoutError as e:\n            # Router LLM timeout - broadcast router_unavailable\n            logger.error(f\"Router timeout: {e}\")\n            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n                utterance=utterance,\n                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                error_reason=\"timeout\",\n            )\n            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n\n        except RouterQuotaError as e:\n            # Router quota exhausted - broadcast router_unavailable\n            logger.error(f\"Router quota exhausted: {e}\")\n            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n                utterance=utterance,\n                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                error_reason=\"quota_exhausted\",\n            )\n            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n\n        except RouterProxyError as e:\n            # Router proxy unreachable - broadcast router_unavailable\n            logger.error(f\"Router proxy error: {e}\")\n            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n                utterance=utterance,\n                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                error_reason=\"proxy_down\",\n            )\n            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n\n    async def process_intent(\n        self,\n        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n    ) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Process a routed intent by dispatching to the appropriate strand.\n\n        Args:\n            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n\n        Returns:\n            Result dictionary with status and data\n        \"\"\"\n        classification = routed_intent.classification\n\n        # Capture per-stage timings for this dispatch and persist one\n        # dispatch_timings row (see Latency Budget & Instrumentation). Each\n        # branch records the stages it measures; router_ms is shared across\n        # the utterance's threads and was stamped on the RoutedIntent. Capture\n        # is non-fatal: a persistence failure logs and moves on, never breaking\n        # the dispatch itself.\n        timings = DispatchTimings()\n        timings.record(\"router_ms\", routed_intent.router_ms)\n\n        try:\n            # For task-profile intents, escalate to bead\n            if classification.intent_type == IntentType.TASK_PROFILE:\n                result = await self._escalate_to_bead(routed_intent, timings)\n            else:\n                # For other intents, fetch then synthesize\n                result = await self._fetch_and_synthesize(routed_intent, timings)\n        except Exception:\n            # Persist whatever was captured before the failure, then re-raise.\n            await self._persist_timings(routed_intent.intent_id, timings)\n            raise\n\n        await self._persist_timings(routed_intent.intent_id, timings)\n        return result\n\n    async def _persist_timings(\n        self,\n        intent_id: str,\n        timings: DispatchTimings,\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Persist the captured dispatch timings. Non-fatal on error.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            store = await self._get_store()\n            await store.record_dispatch_timings(intent_id, **timings.to_fields())\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"dispatch timings not recorded for {intent_id}: {e}\")\n\n    async def _fetch_and_synthesize(\n        self,\n        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n        timings: DispatchTimings,\n    ) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Fetch context then synthesize into structured result.\n\n        Args:\n            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n            timings: Per-stage timing collector; records fetch_first_source_ms,\n                fetch_total_ms, and synthesize_total_ms.\n\n        Returns:\n            Result dictionary with synthesized data\n        \"\"\"\n        classification = routed_intent.classification\n\n        logger.info(\n            f\"Fetching and synthesizing intent {routed_intent.intent_id} \"\n            f\"(type: {classification.intent_type.value})\"\n        )\n\n        try:\n            # Step 1: Fetch context — resolve project slug to local repo path\n            fetch_intent_type = self._map_intent_type(\n                classification.intent_type,\n                classification.lookup_kind\n            )\n\n            from ..environment.discovery import get_registry\n            from ..registry import get_project\n            repo_path = None\n            ssh_target = None\n            host_alias = None\n            registry = get_registry()\n            if registry and classification.project_slug:\n                entry = registry.lookup(classification.project_slug)\n                if entry:\n                    repo_path = str(entry.path)\n                    ssh_target = entry.ssh_target\n                    host_alias = entry.host\n                    location = entry.display_path\n                    logger.info(f\"Resolved '{classification.project_slug}' → {location}\")\n                else:\n                    logger.info(f\"No repo found for slug '{classification.project_slug}'\")\n\n            # YAML registry entry carries cluster/namespace/argocd_app — cluster\n            # drives ArgoCD endpoint resolution (bead adc-1ejh: the fetch strand\n            # resolves {argocd_api} from `cluster` via config/clusters.yaml).\n            # argocd_app defaults to the slug when omitted (see _fetch_argocd_app).\n            project_cfg = (\n                get_project(classification.project_slug)\n                if classification.project_slug else None\n            )\n\n            fetch_request = FetchRequest(\n                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n                context=FetchContext(\n                    project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n                    repo_path=repo_path,\n                    ssh_target=ssh_target,\n                    host_alias=host_alias,\n                    cluster=project_cfg.get(\"cluster\") if project_cfg else None,\n                    namespace=project_cfg.get(\"namespace\") if project_cfg else None,\n                    app_name=project_cfg.get(\"argocd_app\") if project_cfg else None,\n                ),\n            )\n\n            # fetch_first_source_ms = time from fetch start to the first source\n            # resolving (success/fail/timeout — the first progress state on the\n            # pending card). fetch_total_ms = the fetch window close.\n            fetch_start = timings.clock()\n            first_source_at: list[float | None] = [None]\n\n            def _on_first_source(_source, _result) -> None:\n                if first_source_at[0] is None:\n                    first_source_at[0] = timings.clock()\n\n            fetch_result = await execute_fetch(fetch_request, _on_first_source)\n            timings.record(\"fetch_total_ms\", fetch_result.total_duration_ms)\n            if first_source_at[0] is not None:\n                timings.record(\n                    \"fetch_first_source_ms\",\n                    timings.elapsed_ms(fetch_start, first_source_at[0]),\n                )\n\n            # Check for terminal failure: ALL sources failed (Degraded-State UX)\n            if fetch_result.terminal_failure == \"all_sources_failed\":\n                logger.error(\n                    f\"All fetch sources failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: \"\n                    f\"{len(fetch_result.coverage.failed)} failed, \"\n                    f\"{len(fetch_result.coverage.timed_out)} timed out\"\n                )\n\n                # Build failed sources list for error event\n                failed_sources = []\n                for source, result in fetch_result.sources.items():\n                    failed_sources.append({\n                        \"source\": source.value,\n                        \"status\": result.status,\n                        \"error\": result.error,\n                    })\n\n                # Broadcast all_sources_failed error event\n                handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n                await handler.broadcast_all_sources_failed(\n                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n                    intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n                    utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n                    failed_sources=failed_sources,\n                )\n\n                # Update intent status to failed\n                store = get_store()\n                await store.update_intent_status(\n                    routed_intent.intent_id,\n                    \"failed\",\n                    \"All fetch sources failed\",\n                )\n\n                return {\n                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n                    \"error\": \"all_sources_failed\",\n                    \"message\": \"No data — all required sources failed\",\n                    \"terminal_failure\": \"all_sources_failed\",\n                }\n\n            # Check for required source failures (terminal condition)\n            required_sources_failed = [\n                s for s in fetch_result.coverage.failed\n                if any(cmd.source == s and cmd.required\n                       for cmd in get_fetch_commands(fetch_result.intent_type))\n            ]\n\n            if required_sources_failed:\n                failure_reason = f\"Required data sources failed: {', '.join(s.value for s in required_sources_failed)}\"\n                logger.error(f\"Required sources failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {failure_reason}\")\n\n                # Handle terminal failure\n                await self._handle_terminal_failure_for_intent(\n                    routed_intent=routed_intent,\n                    failure_reason=failure_reason,\n                    error_type=\"required_source_failure\",\n                )\n\n                return {\n                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n                    \"error\": failure_reason,\n                    \"message\": \"Required sources failed - cannot proceed\",\n                }\n\n            # Step 2: Synthesize result\n            synthesize_request = SynthesizeRequest(\n                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n                fetched_context=fetch_result,\n                urgency=classification.urgency,\n            )\n\n            synth_start = timings.clock()\n            try:\n                synthesize_result = await synthesize_intent(synthesize_request)\n            except Exception as synth_e:\n                # ZAI failure at synthesize stage - broadcast degraded_raw_data\n                # (Degraded-State UX: fetched data is never discarded)\n                logger.error(\n                    f\"Synthesize failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {synth_e}\"\n                )\n\n                handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n                await handler.broadcast_degraded_raw_data(\n                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n                    intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n                    utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n                    fetched_context=fetch_result,\n                    error_reason=str(synth_e),\n                )\n\n                # Update intent status to failed\n                store = get_store()\n                await store.update_intent_status(\n                    routed_intent.intent_id,\n                    \"failed\",\n                    f\"Synthesize failed: {synth_e}\",\n                )\n\n                return {\n                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n                    \"error\": \"synthesize_failed\",\n                    \"message\":           # synthesize_first_token_ms is not measurable on the current\n            # call_simple path (no token stream) and is left NULL until the\n            # synthesize strand streams — see IntentType.ACTION: \"project\",\n                IntentType.TASK_PROFILE: \"project\",\n            }\n            topic_type = _topic_type_map.get(classification.intent_type, \"research\")\n            topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n                label=classification.utterance_fragment or routed_intent.utterance[:80],\n                topic_type=topic_type,\n                project_slugs=[classification.project_slug] if classification.project_slug else [],\n                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n            )\n            await store.link_intent_to_topic(routed_intent.intent_id, topic_id)\n\n            # Derive result_type from intent classification (includes lookup_kind for lookups)\n            result_type = derive_result_type(\n                intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n                lookup_kind=classification.lookup_kind,\n            )\n\n            result_id = await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n                summary=synthesize_result.summary,\n                data=synthesize_result.data,\n                urgency=synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n                result_type=result_type,\n            )\n\n            # Render card via hot-path selector (deterministic, no LLM)\n            renderer = get_renderer()\n            render_outcome = renderer.render(\n                result_id=result_id,\n                result_type=result_type,\n                result_data=synthesize_result.data,\n                summary=synthesize_result.summary,\n                urgency=synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n            )\n\n            # Update result's card_fallback flag so client knows which path to take\n            await store.update_result_card_fallback(result_id, render_outcome.card_fallback)\n\n            return {\n                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n                \"status\": \"resolved\",\n                \"topic_id\": topic_id,\n                \"result_id\": result_id,\n                \"data\": synthesize_result.data,\n                \"summary\": synthesize_result.summary,\n                \"urgency\": synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n                \"coverage\": synthesize_result.coverage,\n                \"caveats\": synthesize_result.caveats,\n                \"card_fallback\": render_outcome.card_fallback,\n                \"rendered_html\": render_outcome.rendered_html,\n                \"component_id\": render_outcome.component_id,\n                \"message\": \"Intent synthesized successfully\",\n            }\n\n        except \"error\": str(e),\n                \"message\": \"Fetch/synthesize failed - terminal error\",\n            }\n\n    async def _handle_terminal_failure_for_intent(\n        self,\n        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n        failure_reason: str,\n        error_type: str,\n        bead_ref: str | None = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Handle terminal failure for a routed intent.\n\n        Args:\n            routed_intent: The intent that failed\n            failure_reason: Human-readable failure reason\n            error_type: Type of error (worker_crash,
